serviceDetail.ctaTitle: Curious what this could look like for your company?
serviceDetail.ctaBody: Let's have a short call to explore where the opportunities are — no strings attached.

data-engineering.metaDescription: Data pipelines, warehousing and cloud platforms: a reliable foundation your analytics and AI can build on.
data-engineering.title: Data Engineering
data-engineering.intro: Analytics and AI are only as good as the foundation underneath. I design and build data platforms that are reliable, testable and explainable — so every report and every model works from the same truth.
data-engineering.item1Body: A pragmatic architecture that fits your size and your stack — warehouse, lakehouse or something simpler. No overengineering.
data-engineering.item2Body: Automated ETL/ELT pipelines that bring your sources together — reliable, monitored and documented.
data-engineering.item3Body: Clean, tested data models that turn raw data into definitions the whole company agrees on.
data-engineering.item4Body: Testing, orchestration, monitoring and alerting — so problems surface before your stakeholders see them.

data-analytics.metaDescription: Dashboards, KPI frameworks and analyses that answer real business questions — built so your own team can run them.
data-analytics.title: Data Analytics
data-analytics.intro: Data only becomes valuable when someone acts on it. I build dashboards and KPI frameworks that answer the questions your team actually asks — and make sure they can run it themselves.
data-analytics.item1Body: Dashboards designed for decisions, not decoration — from management overview down to operational detail.
data-analytics.item2Body: Together we define the metrics that matter, with clear definitions and one source of truth.
data-analytics.item3Body: Deep-dives into specific questions — pricing, churn, funnel — with clear, actionable conclusions.
data-analytics.item4Body: Documentation, training and governance, so insights don't stay locked up with a single analyst.

ai-genai.metaDescription: AI strategy and working GenAI solutions: document processing, RAG and automation — practical, safe and measurable.
ai-genai.title: AI & GenAI
ai-genai.intro: AI isn't a strategy slide — it's working software. I help you find the use cases with real ROI and then build them: from document processing and RAG to automations that save hours every week.
ai-genai.item1Body: We map your processes and find where AI genuinely pays off — realistic, measurable, no hype.
ai-genai.item2Body: Document processing, chat over your own knowledge base (RAG), content generation — built safely on your data.
ai-genai.item3Body: AI-powered automations inside your existing tools and workflows, from intake to reporting.
ai-genai.item4Body: Evaluation, guardrails and monitoring, so results stay reliable after go-live and your team stays in control.

hero.title: I help companies become data-driven and AI-enabled
hero.subtitle: From data architecture to dashboards, from AI strategy to working solutions. With training so your team can run it themselves.

problem.title: The challenges I see every day
problem.card1Body: You collect data in dozens of systems, but nobody turns it into insights. Reporting is manual, inconsistent or non-existent.
problem.card2Body: No warehouse, no pipelines, no single source of truth. Even if you hired an analyst, there would be nothing solid to work with.
problem.card3Body: Everyone's talking about AI. Competitors are moving. But internally nobody knows what's realistic, what's hype, and where the real ROI is.
problem.closer: If this sounds like your company — I can help.

services.title: From strategy to implementation
services.service1Body: From scattered spreadsheets to a reliable data foundation with dashboards that actually answer questions.
services.service2Body: Practical AI solutions: document processing, RAG systems, automations, and AI strategy that works.
services.service3Body: I build it, train your team to run it, then leave. Every engagement includes knowledge transfer.

process.title: From first conversation to working solution
process.step1Body: I map where you stand with data and AI, and where the opportunities are.
process.step2Body: Based on the scan we draw up a concrete plan with priorities and quick wins.
process.step3Body: I build the solution: data pipelines, dashboards, AI tools, automations.
process.step4Body: I train your team, document everything, and make sure you can run it yourselves.

dataTransformation.forWhom: Companies who know they should do more with their data but don't know where to start.

dashboards.description: Power BI dashboards that give stakeholders the answers they need — without having to ask an analyst every time.
dashboards.forWhom: Management making decisions on gut feel instead of data.

analysis.title: Data analysis & Insights
analysis.description: In-depth analyses that turn raw data into concrete recommendations. Not just what's happening, but what to do about it.
analysis.forWhom: Companies that have data but no insights.

engineering.title: Data Engineering
engineering.description: Building the foundation: pipelines, data warehouses, integrations and ETL processes that make everything else possible.
engineering.forWhom: Companies without a single source of truth. Data sits in silos.

genai.title: LLM/GenAI Solutions
genai.description: Document processing, RAG systems, AI agents, and conversational AI — custom-built for your data and workflows.
genai.forWhom: Companies that want to apply AI but don't know how.

aiStrategy.title: AI strategy
aiStrategy.description: Helping you understand where AI fits and where it doesn't, what's realistic, and what deserves priority. No hype — honest advice.
aiStrategy.forWhom: Management that knows they should do something with AI but not what.

modelDevelopment.title: AI Model Development
modelDevelopment.description: Custom models for specific business problems: classification, prediction, extraction, and more.
modelDevelopment.forWhom: Companies with a specific problem that off-the-shelf tools don't solve.

automation.title: Automations
automation.description: Connecting systems, eliminating manual work, and applying AI to repetitive processes. Redesigning workflows, not stacking tools.
automation.forWhom: Teams that spend hours daily copying, pasting, and processing by hand.

training.title: Training & Workshops
training.description: Teaching teams to work with AI tools, data platforms and analytics. Making the investment pay off after I'm gone.
training.forWhom: Companies that have a solution built but want to run it themselves afterwards.

about.metaTitle: About Ruud Juffermans — Data Analytics & AI Consultant
about.metaDescription: Data Analytics & AI consultant with experience in data engineering, Power BI, GenAI and training teams.
about.name: Ruud Juffermans
about.intro1: I'm a Data Analytics & AI consultant with a background in computer science, data engineering and AI applications. I've worked in aerospace, with the police, and reached thousands of students through online courses.
about.intro2: At the Netherlands Aerospace Centre (NLR) I built data platforms for EU research projects. At Noord-Holland Police I applied AI and data analysis to real investigations — turning unstructured data into actionable insights.
about.intro3: Everywhere I saw the same pattern: companies sitting on valuable data without a way to unlock it, and AI hype without practical implementation. I started this practice to close that gap — for companies that don't have a 20-person data team.
about.pullQuote: I've seen what happens when data and AI work — and what happens when they don't.

timeline.label: Started Computer Science — Business Data Management
Data Engineer at Netherlands Aerospace Centre

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy statement of Ruud Juffermans — Data Analytics & AI Consultant.
privacy.title: Privacy statement

sections.title: 1. Who I am
sections.content: Ruud Juffermans, operating as Data Analytics & AI Consultant, based in Noord-Holland, Netherlands. Email: ruudjuffermans@pm.me.

sections.title: 2. What data I collect
sections.content: Via the contact form: name, email address, optional company name and your message. Via the newsletter: email address. I use privacy-friendly analytics (no cookies, no personal data).

sections.title: 3. Why I collect this data
sections.content: To answer your question and contact you. To send the newsletter you signed up for. To improve the website based on anonymized usage statistics.

sections.title: 4. How long I keep data
sections.content: Contact-form data is kept as long as needed to handle your request, up to a maximum of 12 months. Newsletter data is kept until you unsubscribe.

sections.title: 5. Sharing with third parties
sections.content: I don't share your data with third parties, except where needed for service delivery: Proton (email sending) and Buttondown (newsletter). These processors operate under data-processing agreements.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, delete and transfer your data. You can also object to processing. Contact ruudjuffermans@pm.me for any of these. You can also file a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: This website doesn't use tracking cookies. No cookie banner is needed.

sections.title: 8. Changes
sections.content: This privacy statement may be updated. The latest version is always available on this page.
